answer: The work is Viṣṇu Smṛti (work slug: unknown-visnu-smrti-27f0d8), Chapter 1. Vishnu takes on the form of a Boar to lift the submerged Earth from the cosmic ocean in this primordial creation scene. The text states: 'Took on the auspicious form of the Boar, delighting in sport in the water, as in previous cosmic ages, And lifted up the Earth.' The Earth, which had 'sunk into the single cosmic ocean,' was lifted up 'on the tip of his tusk' by the divine Boar form of Vishnu.
